hero.headline: Stay Ahead of the Machine.
hero.badge: Monitoring AI Research, News & Model Releases
hero.description: Subscribe to receive a weekly autonomous technical digest of the most significant AI model releases, framework breakthroughs, and foundation research papers. Curated by specialized agents, delivered directly to your inbox.
hero.trustSources: Research Papers • Open-Source Projects • Model Releases • Industry News
hero.successMessage: You're on the list! Check your inbox for a confirmation.
hero.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

personalize_desc: You control the signal. Select your focus areas and preferred language, and our agents will tailor a feed specifically for your workflow.
personalize_feedback_some: NeuralBrief is adapting your feed to prioritize these signals.
personalize_feedback_none: Select topics to teach NeuralBrief what matters to you.
how_desc: NeuralBrief quietly does the hard work for you. A seamless workflow that transforms the chaotic AI news cycle into actionable, high-signal intelligence delivered straight to your workflow.
how_step1_desc: We continuously monitor ArXiv, GitHub, model release notes, and top-tier industry blogs in real-time, capturing every significant signal so you don't have to.
how_step2_desc: We analyze every ingested document, aggressively removing marketing fluff, duplicates, and low-relevance content based on your specific focus areas.
how_step3_desc: We synthesize the raw data into concise, technically accurate briefings. We extract the core methodologies, performance metrics, and actionable takeaways.
how_step4_desc: The final dispatch is formatted for maximum readability and delivered to your inbox or directly within the NeuralBrief dashboard, right when you need it.
engine_desc: Our sequence of specialized AI agents runs autonomously every morning at 07:00 UTC.
focus_desc: We monitor the channels that matter, extracting only actionable technical intelligence.
focus_failed_live_feed: Failed to fetch live feed. Showing static signals.

faq.a1: NeuralBrief covers AI Research, Machine Learning, Agentic Frameworks, MLOps, Model Releases, AI Industry news, Data Science, and Tools & Libraries. More domains are being added regularly.
faq.a2: Your briefing is generated and dispatched every day at 07:00 UTC. You should receive it within minutes of that time depending on your email provider.
faq.q3: How do you prevent duplicate articles?
faq.a3: Our Filter Agent uses vector similarity scoring to detect and remove duplicate or near-duplicate content before it reaches the synthesis stage.
faq.a4: Yes. We use Google OAuth only to send you emails via the Gmail API. We never read, store, or index your inbox.
faq.q5: Can I change my topics later?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Visit your profile at any time to update your focus domains. Changes take effect on the next briefing cycle.
faq.a6: Yes, NeuralBrief is currently free during our early access phase. We may introduce premium tiers in the future.
faq.a7: You can disable your digest from your profile preferences at any time, or click the unsubscribe link at the bottom of any email.

cta_desc: Receive your daily intelligence digest at 07:00 UTC.

footer.tagline: Stay sharp. Stay ahead. Every morning.
footer.stay_ahead: Stay ahead. One briefing, every morning.
footer.no_noise: No noise. No ads. Unsubscribe anytime.

features.title: Built for People Who Can't Afford to Miss a Thing
features.subtitle: Four intelligent agents work through the night so you wake up informed, not overwhelmed.
features.desc1: Our Scraper Agent monitors hundreds of trusted tech and industry sources in real time.
features.desc2: The Filter Agent scores every article for relevance and deduplicates overlapping coverage.
features.desc3: The Summary Agent distills each story into two to three clear sentences using Gemini AI.
features.desc4: The Email Agent assembles a beautifully formatted digest and delivers it to your Gmail every morning.

onboarding_welcome_desc: Tell us a bit about what you do so we can calibrate the technical depth of your feed.
onboarding_role_desc: This helps us tune the technical depth of your briefing.
onboarding_intent_desc: This helps us select the right types of papers and news.
onboarding_referral_title: How did you hear about us?
onboarding_done_desc: Your preferences have been saved successfully.
